case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. PAN ROYAL DEVELOPMENT, INC. et al

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAN ROYAL DEVELOPMENT, INC. KUN, JIA POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: NISSAN FORKLIFT MODEL KCPHO1A15V, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $13,765.30 DAMAGES, $1,725.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $352.50 COSTS, $599.43 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,442.23, FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $5,000.00 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
